programmes.show_description: The latest five minute news bulletin from BBC World Service.
Nikki Bedi talks to the award-winning filmmaker and Haiti's former Minister of Culture, Raoul Peck, about his searing new documentary Orwell: 2 + 2 = 5.

Durell Knights was young, gay, and Black in 1980s New York, a city under the shadow of the Aids epidemic. He fell into drug addiction and crime until he found his people.
